not_found_description: Sidan du letar efter finns inte.
home_hero_subtitle: Fullstack-webbutveckling, systemintegration och AI-drivna lösningar — från första commit till produktion. Baserat i Mölndal, Sverige.
home_founder_bio: Projektledare och fullstack-utvecklare som har levererat MMO-spel, klinikwebbplatser, företagsdatasystem och blockkedjeintegrationer. Bygger för närvarande Chronomation och dokumenterar resan på The Builder Coil.
home_newsletter_description: Devloggar från The Builder Coil om framsteg med Chronomation, agentiska AI-experiment och lärdomar från att bygga Ball Lightning AB.
services_subtitle: Från landningssidor till komplexa integrationer — jag bygger snabba, moderna webbapplikationer som rankar, konverterar och skalar. Varje projekt levereras med prestanda, SEO och ren kod inbyggt.
services_tier_landing_description: En ensidig företagswebbplats designad för att konvertera besökare till leads eller kunder. Perfekt för restauranger, salonger, butiker och tjänsteföretag.
services_tier_smart_description: En flersidig webbplats med dynamiskt innehåll, CMS-integration och avancerade interaktioner.
services_tier_integrations_description: Koppla ihop dina system med tredjepartstjänster, bygg API:er eller automatisera arbetsflöden.
services_selected_work_description: Från spelbackends till klinikwebbplatser — sex levererade projekt inom webb, data och spelutveckling.
technologies_subtitle: Verktygen och ramverken bakom varje projekt — vart och ett med verklig produktionserfarenhet från levererade fallstudier.
technologies_cta_description: Varje teknik som listas här demonstreras i ett riktigt, levererat projekt.
portfolio_subtitle: Levererade projekt inom spelutveckling, webbapplikationer, datateknik och innehållsplattformar — varje byggt för att hålla.
portfolio_cta_description: Berätta vad du behöver så ger jag en offert inom 48 timmar.

contact_form_success: Tack för ditt meddelande! Jag återkommer snart.

portfolio_chronomation_description: En multi-tenant innehållsplattform med PDF-redigering, BankID-signering av dokument och innehållsautomatisering — byggd för svenska små och medelstora företag. Under aktiv utveckling.
portfolio_the_builder_coil_description: En publik bygglogg som dokumenterar resan med att leverera mjukvara. Byggd med TanStack Start och inkluderar ett anpassat CMS, RSS-flödes-API, nyhetsbrevssystem och strukturerad SEO — samma stack som driver den här sajten.
portfolio_shipping_api_dojo_description: Interaktiv lärplattform för integration mot transportörers API:er — praktiska REST-, SOAP- och incidentscenarier för FedEx, UPS, DHL med flera.
portfolio_jorild_se_description: Byggde en snabb och tillgänglig tvåspråkig webbplats för en fysioterapiklinik. Innehåller svenskt/engelskt innehåll, Google Business-integration och en prestandafokuserad arkitektur.
portfolio_blightfell_description: Designade och implementerade Favor-systemet för en blockkedjeintegrerad autobattler — köpflöden, skydd mot samtidighetskonflikter och backend-endpoints som driver spelvalutans mekanik.
portfolio_skyscraper_description: Ett massivt multiplayer-onlinespel med deckbuilding-fokus. Ledde projektet från koncept till live-drift, inklusive spelsystemsdesign, serverarkitektur och community management.
portfolio_chronomation_meta_title: Chronomation — Multi-tenant Productivity Platform | Ball Lightning AB
portfolio_chronomation_meta_description: Multi-tenant productivity platform with PDF editing, BankID document signing, and content automation — built for Swedish SMEs.
portfolio_chronomation_og_description: PDF editing, BankID document signing, and content automation for Swedish SMEs.
portfolio_chronomation_schema_descriptio: Multi-tenant productivity platform with PDF editing, BankID document signing, and content automation for Swedish SMEs.
portfolio_chronomation_subtitle_long: Multi-tenant productivity platform with PDF editing and BankID signing as its main pillars
portfolio_chronomation_overview_body: Chronomation is a multi-tenant productivity suite. Currently in active development, it targets Swedish SMEs that need streamlined document workflows with legally binding signatures via BankID.
portfolio_chronomation_core_heading: Core Product: PDF Editor & BankID Signing
portfolio_chronomation_core_body: The platform centers on two pillars: a collaborative PDF editor for creating and annotating documents, and a BankID integration for legally binding digital signatures — critical for contracts and agreements in the Swedish market.
portfolio_chronomation_core_list_1: In-browser PDF editing with annotation and markup tools
portfolio_chronomation_core_list_2: BankID-verified document signing with audit trail
portfolio_chronomation_core_list_3: Multi-tenant workspace isolation and user management
portfolio_chronomation_core_list_4: Automated content generation from work artifacts
portfolio_chronomation_tech_body: Built on TanStack Start with React 19, using Neon Postgres with Drizzle ORM for multi-tenant data isolation. The architecture supports per-tenant configuration, role-based access, and edge-deployed middleware for fast response times across Sweden.
portfolio_chronomation_tech_list_1: Multi-tenant data model with row-level security in Neon Postgres
portfolio_chronomation_tech_list_2: Drizzle ORM for type-safe database queries
portfolio_chronomation_tech_list_3: Edge-deployed on Vercel for sub-100ms TTFB
portfolio_chronomation_tech_list_4: BankID integration via official Swedish e-ID infrastructure
portfolio_chronomation_build_public_pref: Chronomation is being built publicly through
portfolio_chronomation_build_public_suff: documenting architecture decisions, technical challenges, and lessons learned. This transparency serves both as a learning resource for the developer community and as a marketing channel for the product itself.
portfolio_the_builder_coil_meta_title: The Builder Coil — Developer Blog & CMS | Ball Lightning AB
portfolio_the_builder_coil_meta_descript: Public builder's log documenting the journey of shipping software. Built with TanStack Start, featuring a custom CMS, RSS feed API, newsletter system, and structured SEO.
portfolio_the_builder_coil_og_title: The Builder Coil — Developer Blog & CMS
portfolio_the_builder_coil_og_descriptio: Developer blog platform built with TanStack Start — custom CMS, RSS feed, newsletter, and structured SEO.
portfolio_the_builder_coil_schema_descri: Developer blog and content platform built with TanStack Start, featuring a custom CMS, RSS feed API, newsletter system, and structured SEO.
portfolio_the_builder_coil_subtitle_long: A public builder's log documenting the journey of shipping software
portfolio_the_builder_coil_overview_body: The Builder Coil is a developer blog and content platform where I document the journey of shipping software — from architecture decisions to production incidents. It serves as the public voice of Ball Lightning AB, built with the same TanStack Start stack powering this very site.
portfolio_the_builder_coil_content_body: A custom file-based CMS using JSON content files with frontmatter metadata. Blog posts and news articles support Markdown rendering, syntax-highlighted code blocks via Shiki, and automatic reading time estimation.
portfolio_the_builder_coil_content_list_: File-based JSON CMS with typed frontmatter
Automatic reading time and word count
Blog + News content types with separate feeds
portfolio_the_builder_coil_feed_body: A public RSS/JSON feed API that powers the "Latest from The Builder Coil" section on the Ball Lightning homepage. The feed is consumed cross-site, demonstrating how the content platform integrates into the broader Ball Lightning ecosystem.
portfolio_the_builder_coil_feed_list_2: Cross-origin feed consumption for BL homepage
portfolio_the_builder_coil_gallery_alt_b: The Builder Coil blog post page showing article layout and typography
portfolio_the_builder_coil_gallery_alt_f: The Builder Coil feed API response displaying JSON data structure
portfolio_shipping_api_dojo_meta_title: Shipping API Dojo — Carrier API Tutorial Platform | Ball Lightning AB
portfolio_shipping_api_dojo_meta_descrip: Interactive learning platform for shipping carrier API integration — REST, SOAP, and incident scenarios for FedEx, UPS, DHL, and more.
portfolio_shipping_api_dojo_og_title: Shipping API Dojo — Carrier API Tutorial Platform
portfolio_shipping_api_dojo_og_descripti: Learn shipping carrier API integration through hands-on REST, SOAP, and incident scenarios.
portfolio_shipping_api_dojo_schema_descr: Interactive and gamified learning platform for shipping carrier API integration with REST, SOAP, and incident scenario training.
portfolio_shipping_api_dojo_subtitle_lon: Interactive and gamified learning platform for shipping carrier API integration
portfolio_shipping_api_dojo_overview_bod: Shipping API Dojo is an interactive and gamified learning platform born from years of integrating carrier APIs at enterprise scale. It teaches developers how to work with FedEx, UPS, DHL, and other shipping providers through hands-on lessons, real API patterns, and incident scenarios that mirror production challenges. Progress is stored locally.
portfolio_shipping_api_dojo_track_rest_b: Modern carrier APIs using RESTful patterns — authentication flows, rate quoting, label generation, tracking webhooks, and error handling for FedEx, UPS, and regional carriers.
portfolio_shipping_api_dojo_track_soap_b: Legacy carrier APIs still in active use — WSDL parsing, XML envelope construction, certificate auth, and migration strategies from SOAP to REST.
portfolio_shipping_api_dojo_track_incide: Scenario-based training where learners debug realistic shipping integration failures — rate limit storms, stale token cascades, label void races, and carrier outage fallbacks.
portfolio_shipping_api_dojo_wiki_body: A comprehensive reference directory covering major shipping carriers, their API capabilities, authentication methods, sandbox environments, and known quirks. Each entry includes quick-start guides and common pitfalls gathered from real integration projects.
portfolio_shipping_api_dojo_wiki_list_2: Authentication pattern guides (OAuth, API key, certificate)
portfolio_shipping_api_dojo_gallery_alt_: REST or SOAP lesson interface showing code examples and exercises
Incident Arena scenario player debugging API integration issues
portfolio_jorild_se_meta_title: Jorild.se — Bilingual Clinic Website | Ball Lightning AB
portfolio_jorild_se_meta_description: Modern bilingual website for Jorild Osteopati: Next.js 15, Swedish/English i18n, WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility, 100/100 Lighthouse SEO, and Google Business Profile integration.
portfolio_jorild_se_og_title: Jorild.se — Bilingual Clinic Website | Ball Lightning AB
portfolio_jorild_se_og_description: Modern bilingual website for a Swedish osteopathy clinic with i18n, accessibility, and performance-first architecture.
portfolio_jorild_se_schema_description: Modern bilingual website for Jorild Osteopati with Swedish/English i18n, WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility, and 100/100 Lighthouse SEO.
portfolio_jorild_se_gallery_alt_landing: Jorild.se landing page — bilingual clinic website
portfolio_jorild_se_gallery_alt_hero: Hero section with clinic branding, practitioner photo, and appointment call-to-action
portfolio_jorild_se_gallery_alt_about_cl: About the clinic section with practitioner information
portfolio_jorild_se_gallery_alt_services: Services section listing osteopathy treatment options with descriptions
portfolio_jorild_se_gallery_alt_gbp: Google Business Profile integration showing clinic reviews and contact information
portfolio_jorild_se_gallery_alt_kaddio: Kaddio online booking integration with calendar and appointment selection
portfolio_jorild_se_subtitle_long: Modern bilingual website for a Swedish osteopathy clinic
portfolio_jorild_se_overview_body: Designed and developed a modern, high-performance bilingual website for Jorild Osteopati, an osteopathy clinic in Sweden. The result is a conversion-focused, SEO-friendly platform delivering a seamless experience on both desktop and mobile, coupled with a new Google Business Profile. Integrated with Kaddio online booking.
portfolio_jorild_se_i18n_body: Full Swedish/English bilingual support with geolocation-based language detection and a manual language switcher. Content is structured for both languages from the ground up, ensuring natural translations rather than machine-generated output.
portfolio_jorild_se_i18n_list_2: Manual language switch with persistent preference
portfolio_jorild_se_i18n_list_3: Fully localized content, metadata, and structured data
portfolio_jorild_se_seo_body: Achieved a 100/100 Lighthouse SEO score with structured data for improved search visibility, optimized meta tags for both languages, and a new Google Business Profile connecting the clinic to local search results.
portfolio_jorild_se_performance_body: WCAG 2.1 AA accessible with Core Web Vitals optimization throughout. Edge-optimized middleware, automatic image and font optimization, code splitting, and lazy loading ensure fast load times on all devices.
portfolio_jorild_se_performance_list_4: Automatic image optimization and lazy loading
portfolio_blightfell_meta_title: Blightfell — Web3 Game Integration | Ball Lightning AB
portfolio_blightfell_meta_description: End-to-end Web3 integration for Blightfell: on-chain purchase flows, anti-double-spend protections, and server-to-server game backend APIs powering in-game currency.
portfolio_blightfell_og_title: Blightfell — Web3 Game Integration | Ball Lightning AB
portfolio_blightfell_og_description: End-to-end Web3 integration for Blightfell: on-chain purchase flows, anti-double-spend protections, and server-to-server game backend APIs.
portfolio_blightfell_schema_description: End-to-end Web3 integration for a blockchain-integrated strategy autobattler, including on-chain purchase flows, anti-double-spend protections, and server-to-server game backend APIs.
portfolio_blightfell_gallery_alt_site: Blightfell.com — live purchase site where players connect a wallet and acquire Favor
portfolio_blightfell_gallery_alt_steam: Blightfell on Steam — Early Access store page
portfolio_blightfell_gallery_alt_ingame: In-game Favor balance — spendable session currency UI
portfolio_blightfell_gallery_alt_archite: System architecture diagram showing the Favor economy: purchase flow, ledger, Redis guards, and game backend integrations
portfolio_blightfell_hero_alt: Blightfell.com — purchase site for the Favor in-game currency
portfolio_blightfell_subtitle_long: End-to-end Web3 integration for a blockchain-integrated strategy autobattler
portfolio_blightfell_overview_body: Blightfell is a blockchain-integrated strategy autobattler by Merlyn Labs. As Lead Integrations Engineer contracted through Ball Lightning AB, I owned the entire Favor system — the in-game currency that bridges on-chain purchases to gameplay. The work spans from the purchase UX on Blightfell.com through backend verification, ledger accounting, and Unity server-to-server endpoints.
portfolio_blightfell_architecture_body: The Favor economy follows a strict pipeline: on-chain purchase → backend verification → Neon Postgres ledger entry → in-game balance update. Every transaction is idempotent and auditable, with recovery paths for failed states.
portfolio_blightfell_architecture_list_1: Wallet linking and auth flow integrated with Abstract Global Wallet and Arbitrum L2
portfolio_blightfell_architecture_list_2: Idempotent ledger writes with full audit trail in Neon Postgres
portfolio_blightfell_architecture_list_3: Anti-double-spend protections using Upstash Redis guards and distributed locks
portfolio_blightfell_architecture_list_4: Credit and reconciliation cron jobs for production operations
portfolio_blightfell_purchase_body: Built the Blightfell.com purchase experience using Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind, and shadcn/ui. The flow covers auth + wallet linking, pricing/quantity UX, and transaction handoff to credit Favor reliably. Every spend operation uses Redis-backed guards and Neon ledger semantics to handle concurrency and retries safely.
portfolio_blightfell_bundle_body: Delivered the Blood Moon bundle flow spanning a second chain (Arbitrum) with automated crediting and airdrops to Abstract Global Wallet. This required integrating auth and ownership checks across multiple systems, coordinating cross-chain state, and building production-ready runbooks for Early Access operations.
portfolio_skyscraper_meta_title: Skyscraper — Empires Rise | Strategic MMO Deckbattler | Ball Lightning AB
portfolio_skyscraper_meta_description: Strategic MMO deckbattler set in 1980s Manhattan. Co-founded and managed from concept to live operations — game systems design, server architecture, and community management.
portfolio_skyscraper_og_title: Skyscraper — Empires Rise | Ball Lightning AB
portfolio_skyscraper_og_description: Strategic MMO deckbattler: game systems design, server architecture, and community management for a 2.5k+ Discord community.
portfolio_skyscraper_schema_description: A massively multiplayer online deckbuilding strategy game set in 1980s Manhattan, combining tactical card battles with empire management.
portfolio_skyscraper_gallery_alt_wallpap: Skyscraper — Empires Rise game wallpaper featuring the Manhattan skyline
portfolio_skyscraper_gallery_alt_hero: Hero section from the Skyscraper website featuring game artwork and navigation
portfolio_skyscraper_gallery_alt_plot: Game plot visualization showing the narrative arc and story progression
portfolio_skyscraper_subtitle_long: A massively multiplayer online deckbuilding strategy game set in 1980s Manhattan
portfolio_skyscraper_overview_body: An ambitious multiplayer online game that combined strategic deck battling with empire management in 1980s Manhattan. As one of three co-founders, serving as COO and Lead Game Designer from 2022–2023, I played a pivotal role in developing this project from concept to execution over 18 months of production.
portfolio_skyscraper_feature_1_body: Real-time strategic battles using customizable decks filled with unique cards and infinite combinations.
portfolio_skyscraper_feature_2_body: Build and manage your own empire by constructing iconic skyscrapers producing resources and cards for deck battles.
portfolio_skyscraper_feature_3_body: Tactical deck battles combined with strategic MMO empire management.
portfolio_skyscraper_feature_4_body: A captivating storyline set in bustling 1980s Manhattan with rich lore and character development.
portfolio_skyscraper_accomplishments_lis: Co-founded the project, driving its vision from inception through successful community-building efforts.
Managed cross-functional teams including staff coordination on Discord (2.5k+ members) and X (10k+ followers), overseeing external studios for game development and marketing.
Built vibrant community engagement through events and social games that fostered player loyalty throughout 18 months of production.
